events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "sound_source": "",
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Cold joint visible between lifts indicating inadequate bonding between successive concrete placements",
    "Potential discontinuity in the structural element jeopardizing load transfer paths",
    "Construction joint not prepared or treated per specified standards"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately isolate and barricade the affected area if loads are applied",
    "Perform non-destructive testing (e.g., UPV, ground penetrating radar) to assess extent of bond deficiency",
    "Submit an engineering assessment and repair procedure per ACI 301 and project specifications",
    "Remove or repair the defective section by roughening, cleaning, bonding agent application, and re-placement as approved"
  ],
  "rationale": "ACI 301 and 304 require successive lifts to be placed while the underlying concrete is still plastic, or properly prepared construction joints must be used to ensure monolithic behavior. A visible cold joint indicates a lack of bond, constituting an installed-defective and non-compliant condition that may compromise structural integrity.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301-20 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304R-00 Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
}
